en-US.title: WildDex - Animal Identifier
en-US.subtitle: Spot, identify & collect wildlife
en-US.description:
WildDex turns every hike, backyard visit, or safari into a wildlife discovery experience.

Point your camera at any animal and WildDex identifies it instantly — birds, mammals, reptiles, insects, and more. Build your personal collection, log where you spotted each species, and explore a community of wildlife enthusiasts around the world.

──── FEATURES ────

🦁 INSTANT IDENTIFICATION
Snap a photo or upload from your library. WildDex recognizes thousands of species and logs the sighting to your personal collection.

📍 LOCATION LOGGING
Pin every sighting on the map. Browse your discoveries on the Explore map and see where others are spotting wildlife near you.

📖 WILDDEX COLLECTION
Your personal wildlife Pokédex. Every new species you discover gets added to your collection with photos, stats, habitat info, and fun facts.

🏆 BADGES & STREAKS
Earn badges for discovering bird species, mammals, reptiles, and aquatic life. Keep your daily sighting streak alive.

🌍 COMMUNITY FEED
See what animals people are spotting globally. Follow friends, like sightings, and leave comments. Check the Top Spotters leaderboard to see who's found the most species.

🗺️ EXPLORE MAP
Browse sightings from people you follow pinned on a live map. Discover hotspots for rare wildlife in your area.

──── PERFECT FOR ────
• Birdwatchers and nature enthusiasts
• Hikers and outdoor adventurers
• Students learning about wildlife
• Anyone curious about the animals around them

WildDex is free to use. No ads.
en-US.releaseNotes:
• New badge system: earn Wing, Roar, Scale, and Wave badges by discovering bird, mammal, reptile, and aquatic species
• Faster feed loading with instant cache
• Map improvements with your following's sightings
• Dark mode polish and bug fixes

review.notes: The app uses the camera to photograph and identify animals. To test: tap the camera tab (center), take or upload a photo of an animal, and the AI will identify it. You can also browse the Community feed without an account. A test account is provided above for full access.
